name: no-stale-phase-string
description: Flag string literals that reference future-phase work after that phase has shipped.
rationale: When 'coming Phase 7' survives past Phase 7 shipping, users see lies in the UI and the codebase carries dead promises. Bundle 27 left a stale 'lands Phase 7' toast at index.html:8369 even though Phase 7 was wired.
error_message_template: Stale phase reference '{{match}}' at {{file}}:{{line}}. If this phase has shipped, remove the message. If not, add a // guardian-allow: no-stale-phase-string — <reason> (removable when X) comment.

test_fixtures.name: fires on stale toast
test_fixtures.code: showToast('Ask AI — full context lands Phase 7');

test_fixtures.name: passes with guardian-allow
test_fixtures.code:
// guardian-allow: no-stale-phase-string — kept for cross-bundle reference (removable when Bundle 29 ships)
showToast('Phase 5 background work running...');
